sentences.pinyin: Nǐ hǎo, wǒ yào dìng yí ge fáng jiān.
sentences.text_translation_en: Hello, I'd like to book a room.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 您要单人间还是双人间？
sentences.pinyin: Nín yào dān rén jiān hái shì shuāng rén jiān?
sentences.text_translation: Bir kishilik xonami yoki ikki kishilik xonami?
sentences.text_translation_en: Would you like a single room or a double room?
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 单人间。一个晚上多少钱？
sentences.pinyin: Dān rén jiān. Yí ge wǎn shang duō shao qián?
sentences.text_translation: Bir kishilik xona. Bir kechasi qancha turadi?
sentences.text_translation_en: A single room. How much is one night?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.pinyin: Sān bǎi kuài, bāo kuò zǎo cān.
sentences.text_translation: Uch yuz yuan, nonushta ham kiradi.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Kě yǐ kàn kan fáng jiān ma?
sentences.text_translation_en: Can I take a look at the room?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 可以。房间在五楼，有电梯。
sentences.pinyin: Kě yǐ. Fáng jiān zài wǔ lóu, yǒu diàn tī.
sentences.text_translation: Bo'ladi. Xona beshinchi qavatda, lift bor.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Можно. Номер на пятом этаже, есть лифт.
sentences.text_translation_en: Sure. The room is on the fifth floor, there's an elevator.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Fáng jiān lǐ yǒu wǎng luò ma?
sentences.text_translation_en: Is there internet in the room?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.pinyin: Yǒu. Wǎng luò shì miǎn fèi de.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Tài hǎo le. Wǒ yào dìng sān tiān.
sentences.text_translation: Juda yaxshi. Uch kunga band qilmoqchiman.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Отлично. Я хочу забронировать на три дня.
sentences.text_translation_en: Great. I'd like to book for three days.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 好的。请给我您的身份证。
sentences.pinyin: Hǎo de. Qǐng gěi wǒ nín de shēn fèn zhèng.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Хорошо. Дайте, пожалуйста, ваше удостоверение личности.
sentences.text_translation_en: Okay. Please give me your ID card.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 这是您的房卡。三楼305房间。
sentences.pinyin: Zhè shì nín de fáng kǎ. Sān lóu sān líng wǔ fáng jiān.
sentences.text_translation: Bu sizning xona kartangiz. Uchinchi qavat, 305-xona.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Вот ваша ключ-карта. Третий этаж, номер 305.
sentences.text_translation_en: Here's your key card. Third floor, room 305.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Xiè xie. Jǐ diǎn tuì fáng?
sentences.text_translation: Rahmat. Soat nechada xonadan chiqish kerak?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.pinyin: Zhōng wǔ shí èr diǎn yǐ qián.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Hǎo de, wǒ jì zhù le.
sentences.speaker: A
